meta.title: Contact Us — PT Victorindo Kimiatama
meta.description: Request a technical consultation with PT Victorindo Kimiatama — corporate headquarters and factory in Karawang, Jawa Barat. Telp. +62 822-8000-5809.

hero.heading: Request a Technical Consultation
hero.lede: Talk to our technical team about product selection, color matching, application methods, or partnership opportunities.

profileCard.label: Company Profile
profileCard.desc: Get the complete overview of our products, capacity, certifications, and portfolio in one document.

form.heading: Tell Us About Your Project
form.emailError: Please use a valid corporate email address.
form.note: Fields marked * are required. Our technical team typically responds within one business day.
form.success: Thank you — your email client has been opened with your inquiry. If it did not open, please email us directly at info@victorindokimiatama.com.

location.heading: Find Us in Karawang
location.lede: Our head office and manufacturing facility are located in Karawang Timur, Jawa Barat — at the heart of Indonesia's industrial corridor.
